TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bakir_Izetbegovińá, title = Bakir_Izetbegovińá, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bakir_Izetbegovińá} }

S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bakir Izetbegovińá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bosnia and herzegovina anini i ci Bakir Izetbegovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 17 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~vakir i*…ôtb~b~v…ô*o~ub~vi* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~usnia an…¨~…ģ ńß…ôr*…ô*o~ub~vina anini i ¶i b~b~vakir i*…ôtb~b~v…ô*o~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Bakir Izetbegovińá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bosnia and herzegovina anini i ci Bakir Izetbegovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 17 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~vakir i*…ôtb~b~v…ô*o~ub~vi* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~usnia an…¨~…ģ ńß…ôr*…ô*o~ub~vina anini i ¶i b~b~vakir i*…ôtb~b~v…ô*o~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
